product: Connect Genie to Microsoft Copilot Cowork
tagline: Seamlessly integrate Databricks data queries within Copilot Cowork.
what_it_does: This feature allows users to connect Genie to Microsoft Copilot Cowork via the Genie managed MCP server, enabling natural-language queries about Databricks data directly from within Copilot Cowork. The integration requires setting up an OAuth connection and packaging a plugin manifest. Users can leverage this functionality to enhance their data interaction experience without switching platforms.
why_it_matters: This integration empowers users to access and analyze Databricks data more efficiently, improving productivity and decision-making. By enabling natural-language queries, it reduces the technical barrier for non-technical users, fostering a data-driven culture within organizations. This can lead to faster insights and better utilization of data resources.
plain_summary: This feature allows users to connect Genie to Microsoft Copilot Cowork via the Genie managed MCP server, enabling natural language queries about Databricks data directly from within Copilot Cowork. The integration requires setting up an OAuth connection and…

capabilities.title: Natural Language Queries
capabilities.desc: Users can ask questions about their Databricks data using natural language directly in Copilot Cowork.

capabilities.title: OAuth Integration
capabilities.desc: Seamless authentication between Databricks and Copilot Cowork through a custom OAuth app.

capabilities.title: Plugin Management
capabilities.desc: Workspace admins can manage access to the Genie plugin through the Previews page.

capabilities.title: Manifest Configuration
capabilities.desc: Users can customize the plugin manifest to suit their specific Databricks workspace settings.

prerequisites: A Databricks workspace with Genie enabled.
Access to the Teams Developer Portal.
use_cases: Data analysts querying sales data trends.
Data scientists retrieving datasets for analysis.
Executives seeking quick insights from data.

steps.title: Create OAuth App Connection
steps.desc: Set up a custom OAuth app connection in Databricks.

steps.title: Register OAuth Client
steps.desc: Register the OAuth client in the Teams Developer Portal.

steps.title: Configure Manifest
steps.desc: Update the manifest template with your app and OAuth details.

steps.title: Package and Install
steps.desc: Zip the manifest files and install the app using the atk CLI.

steps.title: Enable Plugin
steps.desc: Activate the Databricks Genie plugin in Copilot Cowork.

key_takeaway: The integration of Genie with Microsoft Copilot Cowork enables users to query Databricks data using natural language, enhancing accessibility and productivity.
